banner_title: Lock in or be cooked. Link your Ourstage account. 🔒
step1_title: Yo, to lock in your OurStage account, slide to this channel:
step1_warning:
YOU GOTTA BE IN THE RIGHT CHANNEL OR IT'S A MAJOR L! 💀
Running commands elsewhere is pure brainrot and WILL NOT WORK!
step2_title: Type <cmd>/link</cmd> and click the first one if you got rizz
step2_paste_id: Then drop your ID here, no cap
step2_warning_not_real: This ID is mid, not even real 🤡
step2_warning_enter_id: Drop your OurStage ID here blud
step3_title: This pop-up means you're officially certified. W.
step3_desc: Main character energy. Slide back into the game and start cooking! 🎮🔥
id_help_desc: Find your ID on the title screen. It's vibing at the <loc>{{location}}</loc> of your screen.
id_dash_title: What if my ID is <cmd>-</cmd>? L.
id_dash_desc: Let the game cook for a bit and it'll spawn an ID for you. It might say <cmd>Not allowed</cmd> but that's just a canon event, just click <cmd>OK</cmd> and go back to the title screen.
closing_text: It's a speedrun! Once done, you're ready to cook! 🍳
cm_subtitle: 7 ways to get caught in 4K. Don't let this be you, NPC!
cm_1_desc: The suggestions popped up for a reason, blud. Actually click them next time because if you just type it, the bot thinks you're a ghost. 👻
cm_2_desc: It's just a few numbers, blud. How did you fumble? OCR mixed up 1 and I? Check it fr fr before the bot starts glitching! 💀
cm_3_desc: Dozens of channels and you chose the wrong one? The bot isn't even in there, move to the right channel or it's a major L. 🤡
cm_4_desc: Peak laziness: Watching someone else fail and then doing the same thing. Absolute NPC behavior. Bro read the guide, it's literally one scroll.
cm_5_desc: The bot only wants ONE solid string of numbers. No spaces, no extra yapping, no fat numbers, and NO tiny fonts. Keep it simple for the bot, it's not a sigma! 🤖
cm_6_desc: Player ID IS JUST NUMBERS! It's not your version, not your UUID, and definitely not your name. Lock in and look at the screen! 🧐
cm_7_desc: Saying this again: This is OurStage, NOT the official PJSK! Don't paste your JP server ID here. The bot can't rizz up SEGA's database. ❌
cm_error_18_digits: Not enough digits, that's an L (need 18)
